_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_41_note: Session 41 (2026-06-04, Thursday): TSM deep session. Five new entity entries: (1) 3nm ASP hike +15% H2 2026 (TrendForce May 27) + 3nm capacity 180K WPM (+40%); (2) TSM $2T market cap + $436.69 June 3 close, MoS -12.0%; (3) Broadcom Q2 $10.8B AI semi +143%, Q3 $16B +200% — downstream validation; (4) Meta CapEx raised $125-145B; MS $190B; Google $460B backlog; (5) Taiwan Strait stable, Lai status quo commitment. No DCF run — pending May revenue ~June 8 and Q2 earnings July 16. Price corrections: MRVL June 3 confirmed close ~$319.40 (+9.84%, not -1.41% as estimated in S40); ALAB June 3 close ~$320.09 (vs $324 S40 est.); ANET June 2 close $175.33 (vs $174.36). ALAB +11.1% June 4 (Broadcom read-through). Phase 1b/1c gated (41%6=5). Custom-silicon concept page updated with Broadcom Q2 validation. Susquehanna raised MU PT to $1,750.

event_queue.event: Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued post-earnings. Prior DCF: IV $442.63, MoS -58.6% at ~$1,070 (new ATH June 4). Susquehanna raised PT to $1,750 (June 4). TrendForce Q2 DRAM +58-63% confirms thesis; Q3/Q4 pricing still rising. No deep session before June 24.

May monthly revenue release ~June 8. April was NT$410.73B (+17.5% YoY), 2nd-highest ever. 3nm ASP hike +15% H2 2026 announced (TrendForce May 27); 3nm capacity to 180K WPM (+40%). Ex-dividend $0.955 ex-date June 11. Q2 earnings July 16. Entity updated Session 41. DCF re-run to follow May revenue release — expect IV upgrade toward $420-450+ once ASP hike incorporated.

June 2: Jensen Huang 'next trillion-dollar company' (+32.52% to $290.79). June 3: confirmed close ~$319.40 (+9.84%). June 4: ~$309.13 est. (-3.2% pullback). DCF IV $126.67 (June 2 run at $219.26). At $309.13 MoS = -59.0%. DCF re-run needed at current price. Broadcom Q2 $10.8B AI semi validates MRVL FY2028 $16.5B trajectory. Google MPU talks still ongoing.

June 3 close: $1,726.36 (+1.23%). All-time high. Morgan Stanley EUR 1,660 PT. Intel accepted EXE:5200 High-NA for HVM. DCF last run May 22 (13 days, approaching 30-day threshold June 21). Q2 2026 results expected mid-July. Monitor.

June 2 close $175.33 (confirmed, corrects S40 $174.36 est.). June 3-4: ~$170.50 (-2.7% from June 2). MoS improves to -25.5%. DCF last run May 22 (13 days). No specific catalyst for decline — reversion after Computex AI rerating. Monitor for Q2 2026 results.

June 4: +11.1% to ~$355.76 (Broadcom read-through after AVGO Q2 $10.8B AI semi +143%). June 3 confirmed close ~$320.09 (corrects S40 $324 est.). MoS deepens to -68.6% SELL/AVOID. Deep session was June 3 (S40). No new deep session needed — thesis confirming but valuation gap widening.

_event_queue_note: Session 41: TSM deep session complete (entity updated; DCF pending May revenue). MRVL price corrected upward (June 3 close $319, not $286.70 S40 estimate). ALAB added for +11.1% price move June 4. Rotation advances to MU but gated until June 24 earnings — next session will take ASML or NVDA from event_queue. Priority next session: TSM May revenue (if released ~June 8) or ASML (approaching 30-day DCF threshold June 21).
